summary: End-to-end validation of the Marketing Requests -> Design Requests - New migration + Kanban scroll arrows + admin migration dialog on /design-requests-new. Backend pytest suite (5/5) and frontend Playwright checks all pass. Migrated MR-2026-xxxx detail pages render the dark Command Center with valid Available Actions (SM correctly repointed).
critical_code_review_comments: migrate_from_marketing loads up to 5000 marketing_requests without pagination; fine for current 19-record tenant but should be paged if any tenant grows to 10k+ MRs.
The `_MIGRATION_STATE_MAP` is an identity map; keeping the mapping table (even if identity) is good for future-proofing when DRN lifecycle diverges from MR states.

MigrationDialog re-runs the dry-run every time the button is clicked. If a user closes and reopens repeatedly it is idempotent but generates admin-only HTTP calls; consider caching the result for ~30s or invalidating after a mutation.

Kanban arrow visibility is driven by scroll listeners + updateScrollState; verified in DOM but consider adding ResizeObserver so arrows also update when the viewport is resized without a scroll event.

Detail page uses uppercase CSS labels 'CURRENT STATE'/'AVAILABLE ACTIONS' rather than literal 'Command Center'/'Action Hub' text - matches spec but any external text-based test looking for those literal phrases will miss; visual is unchanged.
test_credentials: CEO surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth / test123 (nyla-air-water). Non-admin used for RBAC: john.distributor@test.com / nyladist##.
seed_data_creation: None. Migration was already committed (19 rows) as noted in the review request; only dry-run verified for idempotency.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified matrix (all PASS): (1) Kanban scroll arrows: right visible at load / left hidden; after scroll right the left becomes visible and once at far-right the right is hidden; after scrolling back both hide correctly. (2) Migration dialog opens for CEO admin; shows 'To migrate 0 / Already done 19 / All caught up - nothing to migrate'; only migration-close-btn (no run-migration-btn) - closes cleanly. (3) List view (?view=list) contains 19 unique MR-2026-xxxx numbers plus DRN-2026-0001 = 20 rows; Kanban header shows '20 requests'. (4) Migrated detail (MR-2026-0022 Neck Tags submitted -> 2 CTAs 'Start Working' + 'Request Inputs'; MR-2026-0021 Final Approved -> CTA 'Start Production') proves state machine repointed to 'Design Requests - New Lifecycle (default)'. Preserved data present: requirement text, additional comments, links (https://instagram.com/nyla), file thumbnails, status history/journey timeline. (5) Regression on redesigned list toolbar: tab-all, tab-my_raised, tab-my_assigned, mr-search-input (URL sync ?q=), status-filter-trigger (8 state chips), advanced-filters-trigger (mr-filter-type/dept/requestedby), 6 sort headers mr-sort-*, mr-view-list/mr-view-kanban all present + functional. mr-clear-filters is conditionally rendered (only when a filter is active) - not a bug. (6) Backend pytest_test_design_requests_new_migration passes: counts.all=20, list carries migrated_from_marketing_request_id + state_machine_name='Design Requests - New Lifecycle (default)', /available-transitions returns 200 with transitions on migrated ids, dry-run migrate returns already_migrated=19 to_migrate=0, distributor gets 403.
